description: Real Estate News is the trusted and impartial news source for our residential real estate community. We strive to empower agents, brokers, executives and other leaders with the information you need to keep moving forward in your business and career.    We are committed to delivering factual stories that are authentic...

The Real Estate Council of Ontario (RECO) regulates real estate agents and brokerages in Ontario. Our mission is to protect consumers by ensuring that real estate agents and brokerages in Ontario understand and follow the law.   RECO provides helpful information and resources on its website at reco.on.ca. Be sure...
